summary: Product Variants Feature Testing Complete - All tests pass for Admin-Editable Product Variants and Dynamic Product Gallery functionality
seed_data_creation: Used seeded products with variant data: ccd58441-eca8-47c3-95ae-da0c7504ac19 (colors), b24e7fca-da00-4d63-bc91-31c78e64b17c (flavors), 0f29ccba-48ef-46eb-9c76-0703d6ae9c37 (both)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product variants feature is fully implemented and tested. Tests verify: 1) Color variants display on product page with working color name updates, 2) Flavor variants display with description updates, 3) Image gallery changes when color variant is selected, 4) Admin products table shows variant counts column, 5) Admin can view/edit existing variants in product edit dialog, 6) Admin can add new color/flavor options, 7) Admin can delete existing color/flavor options. Backend API tests confirm variant data structure and admin CRUD operations.

features_tested.feature: Product page displays color variants from database when product has has_color_options=true
Product page displays flavor variants from database when product has has_flavor_options=true
Clicking color variant updates the displayed color name
Product image gallery changes images when different color variant is selected
Admin can login and access admin products page
Admin products table shows variants column with color/flavor counts
Admin can edit product and see Variants tab with existing colors and flavors
Admin can add new color option with name, hex code, and images
Admin can add new flavor option with name and description
Admin can delete existing color/flavor options
